title: Front-End Engineer - Gen-AI
description:

title: Software Engineer
description:
**Job Description**
* We are looking for a Mid Data Processing Engineer to own and execute UAT data processing activities across dimensional and fact‑based data pipelines. This role focuses heavily on UAT planning, job execution, data validation, issue management, and coverage improvement, working closely with development and reporting teams.


* You will act as the bridge between development, data platform, and reporting, ensuring that changes delivered by the dev team are thoroughly validated, defects are documented and resolved, and UAT confidence is high before production releases. The role also encourages AI‑assisted workflows to improve speed, accuracy, and test coverage.



**Key Responsibilities**




 UAT Planning \\& Execution
   

  




* Plan and manage UAT execution cycles for data processing pipelines
* Understand release content and UAT scope for each sprint or deployment
* Coordinate with Dev, QA, and Reporting teams to align execution timelines
* Track UAT readiness, dependencies, and execution status



 Data Processing \\& Job Execution
   

  




* Understand changes delivered by the development team across Multiple ELT/ETL data pipelines
* Execute batch and incremental data processing jobs in UAT
* Monitor executions, identify failures, and capture logs and evidence
* Validate reruns and ensure consistency across execution cycles



  

  





 Issue Management \\& Defect Handling
   

  




* Record execution failures and anomalies with clear root cause details
* Raise bugs in tracking tools with proper reproduction steps, impact analysis, and data evidence
* Independently analyze and resolve recurring or known issues where possible
* Collaborate with dev teams on complex issues and verify fixes in UAT



  

  





 Data Validation \\& Reporting Validation
   

  




* Perform end‑to‑end functional validation at:
* Table level
* Report / dashboard level
* Validate transformations, aggregations, filters, treatments, and business rules
* Ensure data consistency between source, warehouse, and reports
* Obtain functional sign‑off from business or reporting stakeholders



 Test Coverage \\& Continuous Improvement
   

  




* Identify gaps in UAT coverage and improve validation scenarios
* Build repeatable UAT test cases and datasets
* Promote automation of regression and functional validations
* Improve execution reliability, runtime efficiency, and data confidence



 AI‑Assisted Productivity
   

  




* Use AI tools (e.g., GitHub Copilot, SQL/Python assistants, documentation AI) to:
* Analyze job failures and logs faster
* Accelerate root cause analysis
* Generate validation queries and test cases
* Improve documentation and execution checklists
* Prepare test beds
* Apply AI responsibly by validating outputs before execution or sign‑off



 Data Stand‑up \\& Collaboration
   

  




* Participate in data stand‑up activities, sharing:
* Execution status
* Risks and blockers
* Defects and resolutions
* Provide clear visibility into UAT progress and data readiness
* Collaborate closely with:
* Data Engineers
* Reporting / BI teams
* QA and Business stakeholders


**Qualifications**
* 3–5 years of experience in data processing, UAT validation, data engineering, or analytics operations
* Strong understanding of:
* Data warehousing concepts (Dimensions, Facts)
* Batch and incremental data processing
* Strong SQL skills for data validation and defect analysis
* Experience executing and validating jobs in UAT environments
* Working knowledge of:
* Defect management and tracking tools (Jira or similar)
* Data quality and reconciliation techniques
* Ability to independently troubleshoot and resolve recurring issues
* Exposure to test automation frameworks
* Strong communication and documentation skills



 Nice‑to‑Have Skills
   

  




* Exposure to:
* Snowflake or other cloud data warehouses
* Python for basic validation or automation scripts
* Familiarity with orchestration tools (Airflow, ADF, Control‑M, etc.)
* Experience with data validation frameworks
* Exposure to AI tools for analytics, development, or testing support
* Understanding of reporting tools (Power BI, Tableau, Looker, etc.)


**Additional Information**

**Our Benefits**



* Flexible working environment
* Volunteer time off
* LinkedIn Learning
* Employee\\-Assistance\\-Program (EAP)



 NIQ may utilize artificial intelligence (AI) tools at various stages of the recruitment process, including résumé screening, candidate assessments, interview scheduling, job matching, communication support, and certain administrative tasks that help streamline workflows. These tools are intended to improve efficiency and support fair and consistent evaluation based on job\\-related criteria. All use of AI is governed by NIQ’s principles of fairness, transparency, human oversight, and inclusion. Final hiring decisions are made exclusively by humans. NIQ regularly reviews its AI tools to help mitigate bias and ensure compliance with applicable laws and regulations. If you have questions, require accommodations, or wish to request human review were permitted by law, please contact your local HR representative. For more information, please visit NIQ’s AI Safety Policies and Guiding Principles: https://www.nielseniq.com/global/en/ai\\-safety\\-policies.
   

  




  


**About NIQ**




 NIQ is the world’s leading consumer intelligence company, delivering the most complete understanding of consumer buying behavior and revealing new pathways to growth. In 2023, NIQ combined with GfK, bringing together the two industry leaders with unparalleled global reach. With a holistic retail read and the most comprehensive consumer insights—delivered with advanced analytics through state\\-of\\-the\\-art platforms—NIQ delivers the Full View™. NIQ is an Advent International portfolio company with operations in 100\\+ markets, covering more than 90% of the world’s population.
   

  





 For more information, visit NIQ.com
   

  





 Want to keep up with our latest updates?
   

  





 Follow us on: LinkedIn \\| Instagram \\| Twitter \\| Facebook
   

  




  


**Our commitment to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion**




 At NIQ, we are steadfast in our commitment to fostering an inclusive workplace that mirrors the rich diversity of the communities and markets we serve. We believe that embracing a wide range of perspectives drives innovation and excellence. All employment decisions at NIQ are made without regard to race, color, religion, sex (including pregnancy, sexual orientation, or gender identity), national origin, age, disability, genetic information, marital status, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws. We invite individuals who share our dedication to inclusivity and equity to join us in making a meaningful impact. To learn more about our ongoing efforts in diversity and inclusion, please visit the https://nielseniq.com/global/en/news\\-center/diversity\\-inclusion

title: Engineer I- Software Development
description:
For more than 40 years, Accelya has been the industry’s partner for change, simplifying airline financial and commercial processes and empowering the air transport community to take better control of the future. Whether partnering with IATA on industry\\-wide initiatives or enabling digital transformation to simplify airline processes, Accelya drives the airline industry forward and proudly puts control back in the hands of airlines so they can move further, faster.
   

  

 Role Context
   

  

 As a Software Engineer (SDE I) – Backend (C\\+\\+), you will begin your career by building real production backend systems as part of the FLX ONE Cargo (F1C) engineering team.
   

  

 This role focuses on developing strong fundamentals in C\\+\\+ programming, system\\-level thinking, and backend development through hands\\-on coding.
   

  

 You will work closely with Senior Engineers and Tech Leads, contributing to backend services while learning best practices in performance, reliability, and production engineering.
   

  

 Hands\\-On Development
   

  

* Implement backend services and components using C\\+\\+.
* Contribute to system\\-level functionality under guidance from senior engineers.
* Write clean, maintainable, and production\\-ready code following established patterns.


 Feature Contribution
   

  

* Deliver well\\-scoped features or components from implementation through testing.
* Fix bugs and improve existing functionality with attention to quality and correctness.
* Apply modular design principles to keep code clean and maintainable.


 Quality \\& Engineering Discipline
   

  

* Write unit tests and participate in code reviews to improve code quality.
* Learn and follow engineering best practices around version control, testing, and deployment.
* Develop an understanding of how your code behaves in production environments.


 Learning \\& Growth
   

  

* Learn system design, cloud fundamentals, and operational practices through hands\\-on work.
* Pair with senior engineers to accelerate learning and problem\\-solving skills.
* Actively seek feedback and continuously improve technical skills.


 What You Must Bring
   

  

* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related technical field.
* Internship, academic, or project experience in software development.
* Basic proficiency in C\\+\\+ or strong foundational programming skills with willingness to work in C\\+\\+.
* Foundational understanding of object\\-oriented programming and data structures.
* Strong curiosity, learning mindset, and willingness to take ownership.


 Nice to Have
   

  

* Basic understanding of cloud concepts or experience with AWS.
* Familiarity with Git and collaborative development workflows.
* Experience using AI\\-assisted coding tools to learn faster or improve productivity.


 Why This Role Matters
   

  

 SDE I engineers are the next generation of builders for FLX ONE Cargo. This role provides a strong foundation in real\\-world engineering, setting you up to grow into a confident, independent contributor over time.
   

  

 Interest or experience in C\\+\\+ development is required.
   

  

 Candidates must be willing to work in C\\+\\+ as their primary language.
   

  

 What does the future of the air transport industry look like to you? Whether you’re an industry veteran or someone with experience from other industries, we want to make your ambitions a reality!

title: Software Engineer - UI
description:

* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills

 Functional/Technical Skills

* Strong commitment to quality deliverables with proficiency in unit, integration, acceptance, and contract testing using tools such as Jest, Playwright, Pact, and Rest Assured, and scale the team on the same as needed

* Knowledge in performance optimization, Core Web Vitals \\& SEO principles.
* Good understanding of Web Security principles and best practices (e.g., OWASP Top 10, XSS, CSRF, CSP, secure coding practices).
* Track record delivering WCAG\\-compliant experiences and running automated a11y pipelines.
* Proven experience in building, maintaining and using Design System library ensuring visual consistency and reusability.
* Hands\\-on experience in modern web development tools like ES6/Babel, React, Node.js, NPM, Yarn, and Webpack.
* Strong understanding of HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and TypeScript, along with knowledge of pre\\-processors and methodologies such as SMACSS and BEM.
* Knowledge in working within a monorepo environment (Turborepo, Nx) ensuring efficient code sharing and management (JFrog, Nexus) across multiple micro frontend projects
* Collaboration with other technical domain experts such as cloud, security, SRE, and DevOps.

title: Software Development Engineer
description:
**Your work days are brighter here.**
 We’re obsessed with making hard work pay off, for our people, our customers, and the world around us. As a Fortune 500 company and a leading AI platform for managing people, money, and agents, we’re shaping the future of work so teams can reach their potential and focus on what matters most. The minute you join, you’ll feel it. Not just in the products we build, but in how we show up for each other. Our culture is rooted in integrity, empathy, and shared enthusiasm. We’re in this together, tackling big challenges with bold ideas and genuine care. We look for curious minds and courageous collaborators who bring sun\\-drenched optimism and drive. Whether you're building smarter solutions, supporting customers, or creating a space where everyone belongs, you’ll do meaningful work with Workmates who’ve got your back. In return, we’ll give you the trust to take risks, the tools to grow, the skills to develop and the support of a company invested in you for the long haul. So, if you want to inspire a brighter work day for everyone, including yourself, you’ve found a match in Workday, and we hope to be a match for you too.
   

  

**About The Team**
 Are you energized by seeing AI products come to life in real\\-world settings—especially when they directly impact how companies plan their workforce and finances?
   

  

 At Workday, our Adaptive Planning organization is on a mission to reimagine the FP\\&A customer journey with an AI\\-first attitude. We serve thousands of the world’s largest enterprises, and now we're building agentic workflows that will transform how finance teams interact with planning systems—making them more intelligent, proactive, and efficient.
   

  

 We’re looking for highly creative, results\\-driven, and deeply technical AI/ML Engineers to help us shape the future of financial planning. If you're passionate about building real production\\-grade AI that solves complex business problems and delivers measurable impact—this is your team!
   

  

**About The Role**
 Are you driven to apply innovative AI to real\\-world enterprise challenges? As an AI/ML Engineer on the Workday Adaptive Planning team, you’ll help redefine how financial planning is done at scale—by designing and building intelligent, agentic workflows that power the next generation of FP\\&A solutions. You’ll be at the forefront of bringing "AI\\-first" thinking into production, developing enterprise level intelligent systems that automate, adapt, and assist users throughout the financial planning journey. Your work will directly impact thousands of global enterprises and millions of end users.
   

  

 What You’ll Do:
   

  

* design and development of sophisticated AI agents that reason, learn, and interact across complex business processes to enhance productivity and decision\\-making.
* embed secure, scalable, and reliable agentic capabilities into core Adaptive Planning features.
* collaborate with extraordinary engineers and product managers to bring ideas to life.
* own projects through the development lifecycle—problem framing, data prep, design \\& development, deployment, evaluation, and continuous improvement.
* provide technical guidance to junior engineers. Conduct critical code reviews and unblock the team on deep technical hurdles.


 We’re looking for bold thinkers with strong technical and a product mindset. You’ll need to move fast, think big, and stay grounded in solving real customer problems through AI. If this sounds like your kind of challenge, we’d love to talk.
   

  

**About You**
 Basic Qualifications
   

  

* 2\\+ years experience working on a data science, machine learning or related software development team.
* 2\\+ years experience with Python supporting ML/AI libraries, with experience in shipping secure, production solutions.
* 3\\+ years of experience in object oriented programming with Java.
* 3\\+ years experience in SaaS software development.


**Other Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree in a relevant field, such as Computer Science, Mathematics, or Engineering.
* Extensive experience with large language models (LLM), retrieval augmented generation (RAG) systems, semantic search and text embedding models, vibe coding, MCP, langgraph, transformer neural networks, and related frameworks.
* Experience with cloud computing platforms (e.g. AWS, GCP), containerization technologies (e.g. Docker) and data engineering pipelines (e.g. ETL)
* You have a strong focus on delivering high\\-quality software products, and you value test automation and performance engineering
* Experience developing and deploying machine learning solutions using large\\-scale datasets, including specification design, data collection and labeling, model development, validation, deployment, and ongoing monitoring.
* An ability to balance speed with delivering high\\-quality, practical solutions. Shown perseverance in overcoming significant problems.


**Our Approach to Flexible Work**
 With Flex Work, we’re combining the best of both worlds: in\\-person time and remote. Our approach enables our teams to deepen connections, maintain a strong community, and do their best work. We know that flexibility can take shape in many ways, so rather than a number of required days in\\-office each week, we simply
 **spend at least half (50%) of our time each quarter in the office or in the field** 
 with our customers, prospects, and partners (depending on role). This means you'll have the freedom to create a flexible schedule that caters to your business, team, and personal needs, while being intentional to make the most of time spent together. Those in our remote "home office" roles also have the opportunity to come together in our offices for important moments that matter.
   

  

 At Workday, we are committed to providing an accessible and inclusive hiring experience where all candidates can fully demonstrate their skills. If you require assistance or an accommodation at any point, please email accommodations@workday.com.
   

  

**Are you being referred to one of our roles? If so, ask your connection at Workday about our Employee Referral process!**
 At Workday, we value our candidates’ privacy and data security. Workday will never ask candidates to apply to jobs through websites that are not Workday Careers.
   

  

 Please be aware of sites that may ask for you to input your data in connection with a job posting that appears to be from Workday but is not.
   

  

 In addition, Workday will never ask candidates to pay a recruiting fee, or pay for consulting or coaching services, in order to apply for a job at Workday.

 As a
 **Senior Software Engineer In Test** 
 , you will take part in end\\-to\\-end test automation activities for major initiatives across multiple regions, such as CRM, Contact Center, AI, and Service Operations rollouts. You will be responsible for supporting with test automation solutions, from development through to technical go\\-live. Your role will involve interacting with senior leaders and stakeholders, ensuring alignment across teams, and driving timely, high\\-quality test automation.
   

  

 This is an exciting opportunity for someone passionate about driving test automation at scale, with exposure to large\\-scale E\\-Commerce, CRM, and ERP systems. You will be at the heart of a dynamic environment, where your ability to support with test automation frameworks and scripts will be critical to success.
   

  

**About the CDI Experience Organization:**
 The Consumer Direct Interaction Experience Organization is a Digital Product Organization responsible for delivering tech solutions to our end\\-users and consumers across both pre\\-purchase and post\\-purchase journeys. We are organized in 15\\+ digital product areas, providing solutions ranging from Contact Center, E\\-commerce, Marketing, and Identity to AI. You will play a key role in ensuring the right sizing, right skillset, and core competency across these product areas.
   

  

**What you’ll do:**
* Framework Development: Contribute to, maintain and enhance the test automation framework by adding new capabilities and improving maintainability. Ensure the framework supports scalability, modularity, and cross\\-platform compatibility. Be ready to jump into unknown areas and quickly implement the most suitable solutions.
* Test Script Development: Design, develop, and maintain robust and reusable test automation scripts. Work with different application layers: UI, API, database, and possibly mobile or desktop apps. Implement and maintain utilities and test libraries. If required support developers with unit tests.
* Test Strategy \\& Planning: Collaborate with QA leads and developers to define what to automate, when, and how. Ensure test automation is integrated in the CI/CD pipeline and supports continuous testing.
* Test Execution \\& Maintenance: Regularly run automated tests and analyze results. Identify and troubleshoot test failures, escalating issues when needed. Maintain and update existing test cases and CI/CD pipelines as applications evolve.
* Troubleshooting \\& Debugging: Investigate test failures and identify root causes— whether it’s a test issue, application defect, or environment problem. Provide quick and effective fixes or workarounds.
* Collaboration \\& Mentorship: Collaborate with developers, QA engineers, DevOps, and product owners to ensure alignment on testing objectives. Mentor junior team members on automation best practices and tool usage.
* Code Quality \\& Version Control: Write clean, maintainable, and efficient automation code. Perform code reviews for junior engineers and provide constructive feedback. Ensure adherence to automation coding standards and version control practices.
* Test Data \\& Environment Handling: Set up or manage basic test data for automated runs. Run tests across different environments and report inconsistencies.
* Documentation: Document automated tests and provide clear test case descriptions. Keep test coverage and automation status updated in tracking tools like Jira, TestRail, or similar.


**Who are you:**
* Experience \\& Expertise: hands\\-on experience in at least one of the following programming languages: React,js, Next.js, .net, Java, Javascript, Phyton, Kotlin.
+ hands\\-on experience testing/developing APIm
+ Desired hands\\-on experience testing order fulfillment for e\\-commerce with main focus on SAP Commerce (ccv2\\) and SAP ECC SD/MM
+ Proven experience in building test framework, application development and building applications, working with git. Solid experience with API automation testing, microservices solutions, setting up CI/CD pipelines in Azure DevOps or similar. Great experience with Docker or similar.

* Agile methodology: Experience in working in an Agile environment and comfortable in dynamic settings and requirements. You thrive as fast\\-paced and are an independent contributor with no support required to drive assigned tasks forward with precision and efficiency.
* Communication \\& Collaboration: Proficient in cross\\-functional communication with a demonstrated ability to facilitate team communication and knowledge sharing sessions.
* Technical Proficiency: Hands\\-on experience with latest development tools and processes, DevOps practices and Cloud solutions like Azure, AWS or similar, Robot Framework, Selenium Grid and reporting tools like Grafana, Report Portal or similar.
* Continuous Improvement: Proactively identify areas for automation improvement or technical debt reduction. Stay current with industry trends, tools, and emerging practices.
* Educational Background: A Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.


**Where you'll be:**
 This is a full\\-time position, based in Bangalore, India
   

  

**Benefits Highlights:**
* Flexible work hours and a hybrid work environment
* Discounts on our award\\-winning Electrolux products and services
* Family\\-friendly benefits
* Extensive learning opportunities and a flexible career path


 As part of the Electrolux Group, we will continuously invest in you and your development. There are no barriers to where your career could take you.

description:

Founded in 2012, Guardant is transforming patient care and accelerating new cancer therapies by providing critical insights into what drives disease through its advanced blood and tissue tests, real\\-world data and AI analytics. Guardant tests help improve outcomes across all stages of care, including screening to find cancer early, monitoring for recurrence in early\\-stage cancer, and treatment selection for patients with advanced cancer. For more information, visit guardanthealth.com and follow the company on LinkedIn, X (Twitter) and Facebook.
   

  

**Job Description**

While we’re best known for our molecular diagnostics, which unlock the genomic signatures of cancer, these tests are just the first step in the equation. Turning this genomic data into actionable insights shared with thousands of patients, physicians, and researchers in a scalable, reliable, and secure fashion is a software product challenge.

We connect patients with clinical trials, help clinicians order our test and receive our clinical reports, and deliver valuable genomic datasets to researchers to help uncover important insights into treatment paradigms and drug discovery. Our technology stack reflects our views of using the best tools for the job, employing Java, Python, Ruby, Node, React along with Kubernetes, Docker, MuleSoft, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, high\\-performance computing clusters (HPC), and a variety of AWS services to analyze and disseminate vast volumes of genomic data.

* 6\\+ years of experience designing, developing, and consuming RESTful APIs using RAML, Swagger / OpenAPI

title: Engineer - Tunnel
description:
At Jacobs, we're challenging today to reinvent tomorrow by solving the world's most critical problems for thriving cities, resilient environments, mission\\-critical outcomes, operational advancement, scientific discovery and cutting\\-edge manufacturing, turning abstract ideas into realities that transform the world for good.
   

  

 Your impact
   

  

 We are seeking a Tunnel Design engineer (with a minimum of 12\\+ years of experience), specializing in TBM Tunnel Design with a strong understanding of geotechnical and structural principles. The successful candidate will play a key role in the design and development of tunnelling projects, ensuring the integrity, safety, and functionality of underground structures. This position offers an exciting opportunity to contribute to innovative tunnelling solutions and infrastructure development.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Technically lead the TBM tunnel design delivery in single or multi\\-disciplinary projects, ensuring compliance with industry standards and project specifications
* Develop detailed engineering designs, drawings, and specifications for tunnel alignments, cross\\-sections, support systems, and lining structures/segments.
* Keep up to date with industry developments, engineering innovations and best practices with respect to own discipline and other disciplines on a global scale
* Support the technical capabilities of the discipline and the company wide business and maintain contact with key technical leaders across Jacobs offices and around the world
* Contribute to and lead design reviews in alignment with the Jacobs Management system
* Review and approve drawings and reports of tunnel design, geotechnical design as well as specifications, and other design documents
* Collaborate with multidisciplinary teams, including structural, geotechnical, civil engineers and geologists to integrate geotechnical solutions.
* Manage geotechnical risks and propose mitigation strategies
* Engage with clients, contractors, and stakeholders to provide expert recommendations
* Drive innovation and utilize technological advancement
* Experience in geotechnical fieldwork, laboratory testing, and data interpretation.
* Author and co\\-author technical papers for conferences
* Knowledge of Ground Investigation (GI) techniques and design parameter derivation
* Conduct field visits and site inspections to monitor construction progress, assess site conditions, and address any design\\-related issues or modifications.
* Ensure that Health \\& Safety is embedded into all work practices in line with Jacobs policies


 Here's what you'll need
   

  

* BEng/BTech in Civil/Geotechnical Engineering or an equivalent degree, with a minimum of 12 years of post\\-graduate experience in Tunnel Design. Master's degree in TBM/tunnel//rock engineering preferred.
* Regional Experience Preferred experience working on projects in the Middle East, particularly in the UAE and KSA, either in\\-country or from a remote design office
* Client Engagement Strong client\\-facing skills and experience.
* Overseas Travel No restrictions on traveling overseas (e.g., UAE and KSA) for client meetings and workshops.
* Domestic Travel No restrictions for domestic travel for site visits and client meetings as per the company/project requirements.
* Strong understanding in tunnel engineering principles, including geotechnical engineering, rock mechanics, and ground improvement techniques.
* Proficiency in structural engineering concepts and analysis, with experience in designing tunnel support systems, linings, and underground structures.
* Solid understanding of engineering software such as RocScience Suite, PLAXIS/MIDAS, FLAC/UDEC, SAP2000, or similar tools for geotechnical and structural analysis.
* Excellent problem\\-solving skills and the ability to analyze complex technical challenges in tunnelling projects.
* Effective communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively with multidisciplinary teams and stakeholders.
* Professional Membership Membership in a relevant professional body is required and chartered Engineer status is preferred.


 At Jacobs we value people. Having the right balance of belonging, career and lifestyle enables us to consistently deliver and exceed clients’ expectations.
   

  

 Working alongside industry leaders, you will have the opportunity to develop your career working on key projects in an environment which encourages collaboration, knowledge sharing and innovation. To support your professional growth, Jacobs flexible working arrangements, extended leave options and a host of social, health and wellbeing events and initiatives will underpin our commitment to you.
   

  

 At Jacobs it’s all about what you do, not where you are, which counts!
   

  

 We value collaboration and believe that in\\-person interactions are crucial for both our culture and client delivery. We empower employees with our hybrid working policy, allowing them to split their work week between Jacobs offices/projects and remote locations enabling them to deliver their best work.
   

  

 Your application experience is important to us, and we’re keen to adapt to make every interaction even better. If you require further support or reasonable adjustments with regards to the recruitment process (for example, you require the application form in a different format), please contact the team via Careers Support.

title: Engineer Bridges
description:
It has been more than 60 years since SYSTRA has garnered expertise that spans the entire spectrum of Mass Rapid Transit System. SYSTRA India’s valuable presence in India roots back to 1957, where SYSTRA worked on the electrification of Indian Railways. Our technical excellence, holistic approach and the tremendous talent provides a career that puts people who join us at the heart of improving transportation and urban infrastructure efficiency.
   

  

 Understand better who we are by visiting www.systra.in
   

  

 Context
   

  

 In India, SYSTRA is an international consulting and engineering company operating in the fields of Metros, High Speed Rail, Railways, Roads, Buildings, Urban planning, and Water Infrastructure for public and private organizations.
   

  

 CTR – Regional Technical Centre of Systra India takes care of the international production of major projects at Systra Group level. CTR team has expertise in design of High\\-Speed Rail, Metro, Conventional Rail, Bridges, Highways, Depots, Stations and Transport Planning. Starting from Feasibility/Concept stage to Detailed Design to IFC/Shop drawings, the disciplines involved have experience of designing in accordance with various international codes and delivered projects across the world.
   

  

 CTR team has successfully delivered some major projects in UK, UAE, Tanzania, KSA, Australia, Canada and Denmark. One of the major achievements of India CTR team has been the design of HS2 project in UK. We played an instrumental role in delivering 3 major Sublots on HS2 with our teams proactively engaging with Front Office in UK and delivering beyond client expectations. This resulted in India team receiving many accolades from the contractor BBV and client HS2\\.
   

  

 CTR team in India is proficient in working on multi\\-disciplinary projects integrating Design, BIM and Drawing production in a seamless workflow incorporating different software. The technical and management teams within CTR get an opportunity to work and interact with other CTR teams within Systra Group from Paris, Poland, Dubai, Philippines and Brazil.
   

  

 We are seeking applications for the position of Engineer—Bridges for Ahmedabad, Kolkata, Noida, Bangalore
   

  

 Missions/Main Duties
   

  

* Take responsibility for Metro \\& Rail bridge design, viaduct \\& Structure design.
* Prepare reports and calculations in line with International Codes of Practice (AREMA, AASTHO, EURO).
* Plan and deliver bridge surveys and inspections, including recording of all relevant information
* Can perform bridge assessment calculation and report.
* Manage delivery of projects
* Preparation of estimates for work items.
* Identify scope change items.
* Knowledge of working on big multi\\-disciplinary projects on BIM.
* Ensure compliance of the Systra Group policies, particularly on ethics, safety and adherence to Company ISO Standards.


 Profile/Skills
   

  

* BE\\-Civil \\+ M.Tech in Structural Engineering
* 2 to 5 years of experience into relevant field.
* Experience on Software requirement Sofistik, Midas, Oasys.
* Actively working towards Professional qualification.
* Ability to work in a collaborative multi\\-discipline design team.
* Ability to complete assigned tasks with minimal supervision and provide support and mentoring to others.
* Ability to travel to client sites and other SYSTRA offices will be required.


 We commit to put people who join us at the heart of improving transportation and urban infrastructure efficiency. As we are growing, this is time to be a part of this challenging adventure. It’s not a job \\- it’s a career!

description:
It has been more than 60 years since SYSTRA has garnered expertise that spans the entire spectrum of Mass Rapid Transit System. SYSTRA India’s valuable presence in India roots back to 1957, where SYSTRA worked on the electrification of Indian Railways. Our technical excellence, holistic approach and the tremendous talent provides a career that puts people who join us at the heart of improving transportation and urban infrastructure efficiency.
   

  

 Understand better who we are by visiting www.systra.in
   

  

 Context
   

  

 In India, SYSTRA is an international consulting and engineering company operating in the fields of Metros, High Speed Rail, Railways, Roads, Buildings, Urban planning, and Water Infrastructure for public and private organizations.
   

  

 CTR – Regional Technical Centre of Systra India takes care of the international production of major projects at Systra Group level. CTR team has expertise in design of High\\-Speed Rail, Metro, Conventional Rail, Bridges, Highways, Depots, Stations and Transport Planning. Starting from Feasibility/Concept stage to Detailed Design to IFC/Shop drawings, the disciplines involved have experience of designing in accordance with various international codes and delivered projects across the world.
   

  

 CTR team has successfully delivered some major projects in UK, UAE, Tanzania, KSA, Australia, Canada and Denmark. One of the major achievements of India CTR team has been the design of HS2 project in UK. We played an instrumental role in delivering 3 major Sublots on HS2 with our teams proactively engaging with Front Office in UK and delivering beyond client expectations. This resulted in India team receiving many accolades from the contractor BBV and client HS2\\.
   

  

 CTR team in India is proficient in working on multi\\-disciplinary projects integrating Design, BIM and Drawing production in a seamless workflow incorporating different software. The technical and management teams within CTR get an opportunity to work and interact with other CTR teams within Systra Group from Paris, Poland, Dubai, Philippines and Brazil.
   

  

 We are seeking applications for the position of Engineer—Bridges for Ahmedabad, Kolkata, Noida, Bangalore
   

  

 Missions/Main Duties
   

  

* Take responsibility for Metro \\& Rail bridge design, viaduct \\& Structure design.
* Prepare reports and calculations in line with International Codes of Practice (AREMA, AASTHO, EURO).
* Plan and deliver bridge surveys and inspections, including recording of all relevant information
* Can perform bridge assessment calculation and report.
* Manage delivery of projects
* Preparation of estimates for work items.
* Identify scope change items.
* Knowledge of working on big multi\\-disciplinary projects on BIM.
* Ensure compliance of the Systra Group policies, particularly on ethics, safety and adherence to Company ISO Standards.


 Profile/Skills
   

  

* BE\\-Civil \\+ M.Tech in Structural Engineering
* 2 to 5 years of experience into relevant field.
* Experience on Software requirement Sofistik, Midas, Oasys.
* Actively working towards Professional qualification.
* Ability to work in a collaborative multi\\-discipline design team.
* Ability to complete assigned tasks with minimal supervision and provide support and mentoring to others.
* Ability to travel to client sites and other SYSTRA offices will be required.


 We commit to put people who join us at the heart of improving transportation and urban infrastructure efficiency. As we are growing, this is time to be a part of this challenging adventure. It’s not a job \\- it’s a career!

title: Senior QA Engineer [T500-25052]
description:
ANSR is hiring for one of its clients.
 



**ABOUT UNDER ARMOUR:** 




 Our story is a classic American entrepreneurial journey, born from a simple, unmet need identified by an athlete. In 1996, founder Kevin Plank, then captain of the University of Maryland football team, set out to solve the problem of sweat\\-soaked cotton shirts by creating a moisture\\-wicking synthetic alternative. That innovation – HeatGear – redefined the athletic base layer and laid the foundation for what is today a global leader in performance apparel, footwear, and accessories.
 



 Headquartered in Baltimore, Maryland, Under Armour is driven by a clear mission – to make all athletes better. This relentless pursuit of better defines who we are, shaping our focus on performance, innovation, and continuous improvement.
 



  





**OUR PURPOSE:** 




 Building on this global foundation, Under Armour India is purpose\\-built to access India’s top\\-tier talent and embed the brand’s culture into scalable, tech\\-driven solutions. At its core, this is about empowering those who strive for more – a belief reflected in our values: Act Sustainably, Celebrate the Wins, Fight on Together, Love Athletes, and Stand for Equality.
 



 These values serve as a shared framework that guides how we think, build, and collaborate. They connect teams across geographies, reinforce our purpose, and ensure that everything we do is aligned to a common goal – enabling better outcomes for athletes and the business.
 



 At Under Armour India, this translates into an environment where individuals have the freedom to go further, regardless of role. Teams are empowered to develop and deliver state\\-of\\-the\\-art products and digital solutions that enhance performance and drive impact at scale.
 



  





**VALUES \\& INNOVATION:** 




 Across Under Armour globally, our values act as the thread that unites every teammate, shaping a culture grounded in purpose, accountability, and shared ambition. They are not just principles, but active drivers of how we operate, innovate, and grow together.
 



 This culture is deeply anchored in innovation – a continuous pursuit of better that pushes boundaries and challenges convention. Whether through product innovation or digital transformation, teams are enabled to create solutions that elevate performance and redefine possibilities for athletes everywhere
 



  





**PURPOSE OF ROLE:** 




 The Under Armour Sr QA Engineer will be embedded within Ecommerce and Omni Digital projects and feature teams, taking ownership of quality and establishing best practices while driving continuous process improvement across cross\\-functional teams.
 



 In this role, the Sr. QA Engineer will lead QA efforts for projects and features, coordinate automation execution aligned with delivery cadence, and collaborate closely with PMO, Product and development teams. They will contribute to requirement analysis, test design, and functional validation, including API, backend, data, and UI/UX testing as applicable. This role requires an automation\\-first, shift\\-left mindset, expanding automated test coverage and supporting UA’s global automation goals.
 



 The Sr. QA Engineer will own and maintain the existing test suite, expand coverage where needed, and guide team members on QA best practices.
 



  





**YOUR IMPACT (Job Responsibilities):** 



* Lead the quality of an assigned project and its features through automation.
* Coordinate the execution of automated tests with a project’s testing cadence.
* Requirement and test analysis, and documentation.
* Functional testing verification.
* Contribute to test design and test case review\\- including API and backend testing; data analytics testing, and UI and UX analysis and testing.
* Communicate testing status and results to Product, Engineering, PMO and QA teammates.
* Expanding test automation coverage of assigned projects.
* Contribute to optimizing and prioritizing manual and automated testcases to increase testing velocity.
* Contribute to Global QA org’s continuous improvement and project team’s quality process.
* Advocate for and implement automation best practices \\& processes.
* Investigate and implement creative solutions for test cases that are challenging to automate.
* Prioritize and assign QA tasks to junior QA and contractors.
* Coordinate end\\-to\\-end testing with internal UA orgs and external teams.
* Provide clear, actionable status reporting.
* Maintain the feedback loop between UA, UA India and vendor teams
* Strong understanding of web application testing concepts including HTTP, REST, cookies, session handling, etc.
* Experience validating integrations with payment gateways, shipping providers, analytics tools, and PIMs.



  





**QUALIFICATIONS:** 



* Bachelor's degree with typically 5 years of relevant experience OR Master's degree with typically 3 years of relevant experience OR typically 9 years of relevant work experience without a degree
* Ecommerce on Web and Native Mobile experience.
* Experience with web, mobile and API test automation.
* Experience analyzing and testing UI and UX requirements.
* Postman, GraphQL, Proxy tools, JIRA/ Confluence, Git, and Xcode experience.
* Experience with TestFlight, Firebase App Distribution, and viewing device logs via Xcode Console.
* Experience with observability tools like Datadog to monitor errors in production.
* Experience with Test result analysis and investigation of failures, including automation runs.
* Experience with change impact analysis.
* Experience with risk\\-based test analysis.
* Strong understanding of QA concepts, methodologies and automation principles.



  





**WORKPLACE LOCATION:** 




**Location:** 



* This individual must reside within commuting distance from our
 
 office.



**Work Schedule:** 



* This role follows a hybrid work schedule, requiring 4 days in\\-office per week



  





**OUR COMMITMENT TO EQUAL OPPORTUNITIY:** 




 At Under Armour, we are committed to providing an environment of mutual respect where equal employment opportunities are available to all applicants and teammates without regard to race, color, religion or belief, sex, pregnancy (including childbirth, lactation and related medical conditions), national origin, age, physical and mental disability, marital status, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, genetic information (including characteristics and testing), military and veteran status, family or paternal status and any other characteristic protected by applicable law. Under Armour seeks to recruit, develop and retain the most talented people representing a wide variety of backgrounds and perspectives. Reasonable accommodations are available for applicants with disabilities upon request.

**Job Description**
 Capella Platform team owns the reliability and scalability of our multi\\-cloud infrastructure. You will join the Capella Platform team as a Senior Platform Engineer to lead the implementation, and operation of Kubernetes\\-based platforms, Internal Developer Platforms (IDP), and SRE tooling across AWS, Azure, and GCP.  A Senior Platform Engineer specializing in cloud\\-native infrastructure and IDP will architect scalable platform services using Terraform and Golang, mentor engineers, and establish golden paths for developer self\\-service, ensuring Capella's high availability and compliance with enterprise standards.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Implement multi\\-cloud platform infrastructure using Terraform IaC, Kubernetes (EKS/GKE/AKS), and Golang services for autoscaling, observability, and IDP features.
* Lead IDP development for self\\-service workflows including namespace provisioning, CI/CD gating, security scanning (Aikido/Snyk), and compliance automation (SOC2, CIS benchmarks).
* Design and optimize observability stacks (Datadog, Prometheus, SIEM) for platform KPIs, incident response, and capacity planning in production environments.
* Perform advanced troubleshooting, root cause analysis, and on\\-call leadership for platform incidents; drive post\\-mortems and reliability improvements.
* Align platform controls with NIST, ISO27001, PCI DSS frameworks; integrate security best practices (IAM, encryption, WAF) across cloud providers.
* Mentor junior engineers through code reviews, technical design docs, and knowledge sharing; collaborate cross\\-functionally to enable secure feature velocity.
* Drive platform evolution including cost optimization, multi\\-region HA, and developer productivity tooling (Backstage/Humanitec preferred).
* Maintain comprehensive documentation, automation libraries, and contribute to open\\-source or internal tooling for platform sustainability.


**Required Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s/Master’s degree in computer science, or related field, or equivalent experience.
* 5\\+ years in platform/SRE engineering with hands\\-on expertise in AWS/Azure/GCP, Kubernetes, and Terraform for multi\\-cloud deployments.
* Deep knowledge of Golang/Python, distributed systems, microservices, concurrency, and high\\-availability architectures.
* Proven experience with CI/CD (GitHub Actions), observability (Datadog/Corologix), container security, and SRE practices (SLIs/SLOs).
* Strong track record in incident management, compliance automation, and cross\\-team collaboration in product companies.
* Excellent problem\\-solving, leadership, and communication skills for global stakeholder engagement.


**Preferred Skills/Certifications**
* IDP experience building developer portals (Backstage, Humanitec, Roadie) or self\\-service platforms. Cloud certifications (AWS Solutions Architect Professional, CKA/CKAD, Terraform Associate).

title: Senior Staff Software Engineer
description:
**Job Description Summary**
 As a Senior Staff Software Engineer, you will serve as a technical leader responsible for designing, building, and evolving large‑scale, cloud‑native platform services. This role has significant impact across teams and products and requires deep expertise in distributed systems, security‑sensitive platforms, and cloud architecture.
   

  

 You will lead the design and development of services that operate on medical imaging and healthcare data, while ensuring the highest standards of reliability, security, performance, and compliance. You will also apply AI‑assisted capabilities within the software development lifecycle to improve engineering productivity and system quality in a responsible and pragmatic way.
   

  

 GE Healthcare is a leading global medical technology and digital solutions innovator. Our mission is to create a world where healthcare has no limits. Unlock your ambition, turn ideas into world\\-changing realities, and join an organization where every voice makes a difference, and every difference builds a healthier world.
   

  

**Job Description**
 Roles and Responsibilities
   

  

**In This Role, You Will**
**Technical Leadership \\& Architecture**
* Own the technical strategy, architecture, and execution of complex, cloud‑native platforms and services, including security‑critical and AI‑enabled systems
* Lead the design and evolution of distributed systems with a strong focus on scalability, reliability, security, performance, and cost efficiency
* Act as a technical authority for major feature areas or platforms, influencing architecture and engineering decisions across multiple teams
* Drive architecture and design reviews, define service boundaries, API contracts, and shared frameworks, ensuring alignment with long‑term product and platform goals
* Make informed and pragmatic technology and architecture decisions after assessing trade‑offs, risks, operational impact, and total cost of ownership


**Cloud, Platform, and Security Systems**
* Design and lead the development of cloud‑native services using containerized microservices, serverless functions, and event‑driven architectures
* Architect and operate security‑sensitive systems, including orchestration platforms for malware or image scanning pipelines that handle untrusted inputs at scale
* Apply secure‑by‑design principles, including defense‑in‑depth, isolation, least privilege, auditability, and failure containment
* Ensure systems meet enterprise security, compliance, and data‑protection requirements, particularly when handling regulated or sensitive data


**AI‑Enabled Engineering \\& Software Development Life Cycle**
* Apply AI‑assisted capabilities across the SDLC, including design support, code development, testing, troubleshooting, and operational automation
* Lead the responsible integration of AI‑enabled system components, understanding and mitigating risks related to non‑deterministic behavior, observability, latency, and cost
* Establish engineering best practices for building, validating, and operating AI‑powered features within production systems
* Mentor teams on practical and responsible use of AI tools to improve productivity, quality, and developer experience


**Product \\& Domain Expertise**
* Develop a deep understanding of the end‑to‑end product, domain, and customer workflows, acting as a bridge between business needs and technical solutions
* Design and evolve systems that integrate with healthcare data standards and APIs, including HL7 and FHIR, while ensuring data privacy, security, and interoperability
* Collaborate closely with Product Line Leaders, architects, and stakeholders to translate product vision into scalable, resilient technical solutions


**Execution \\& Operational Excellence**
* Lead complex initiatives from concept through production, providing technical direction, estimates, risk mitigation plans, and delivery strategies
* Establish and enforce engineering standards for code quality, testing, CI/CD, observability, and operational readiness
* Assess and continuously improve system performance, availability, and operational efficiency in production environments
* Drive continuous improvement through data‑driven insights, retrospectives, and technical debt reduction


**Mentorship \\& Cross‑Organizational Influence**
* Serve as a senior technical mentor and role model, guiding engineers across teams in design thinking, system architecture, and engineering excellence
* Influence engineering culture by promoting best practices, knowledge sharing, and technical rigor
* Partner across modalities in organization to align on architecture, standards, and shared platforms


**Educational Qualification**
* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Engineering, or a STEM discipline
* Master’s degree or equivalent industry experience is a plus


**Technical Qualifications**
* 12\\+ years of professional software engineering experience with a strong record of delivering large‑scale, business‑critical systems
* Deep expertise in designing and operating distributed, cloud‑native systems on AWS or equivalent cloud platforms
* Proven experience in system architecture and platform design, including reliability, scalability, availability, performance, and cost optimization
* Strong programming expertise in Java or TypeScript, with hands‑on experience in Python and/or Golang
* Extensive experience with containerized microservices, Kubernetes, Docker, and cloud‑native CI/CD pipelines
* Experience designing and leading event‑driven and asynchronous systems, including messaging, orchestration, and workflow platforms
* Proven experience building and operating security‑sensitive systems, such as malware scanning pipelines, content inspection, or policy‑driven enforcement services
* Strong understanding of secure system design for handling untrusted inputs, including isolation, sandboxing, IAM, secrets management, and auditability
* Hands‑on experience supporting production systems, including monitoring, incident management, root‑cause analysis, and operational improvements
* Working knowledge of AI‑enabled systems within the SDLC, including responsible use of AI‑assisted development tools and production integration of AI‑powered features
* Demonstrated continuous learning through practical adoption of new technologies, methodologies, or domains (e.g., cloud platforms, AI‑assisted development, security, healthcare standards)


**Desired Qualifications**
* Experience designing platform‑level services used by multiple teams or products.
* Experience working with healthcare or regulated data environments, including PHI handling, access controls, and audit requirements.
* Exposure to healthcare interoperability standards, such as HL7 and FHIR, including experience consuming or designing FHIR‑based APIs, with awareness of data privacy and security considerations.
* Hands‑on exposure to image, artifact, or container scanning pipelines, including orchestration, queuing, retries, and failure isolation
* Practical understanding of AI system trade‑offs, including non‑deterministic behavior, false positives/negatives, evaluation strategies, and operational monitoring
* Experience combining data systems, analytics, and telemetry to drive system insights and continuous improvement
* Strong ability to balance engineering velocity with safety, security, and compliance
* Experience collaborating directly with customers or external stakeholders to shape architecture and resolve complex technical issues
* Contributions to internal platforms, shared libraries, or technical standards that raised overall engineering quality


**Business Acumen**
* Demonstrated ability to align technical strategy with business priorities and customer outcomes
* Strong understanding of how platforms, services, and architectural decisions impact cost, risk, scalability, and time‑to‑market
* Ability to translate complex technical concepts into clear, compelling narratives for product, leadership, and cross‑functional stakeholders
* Proven skill in navigating large, matrixed organizations to drive alignment and execution
* Ability to anticipate organizational and technical risks and proactively define mitigation strategies
* Broad awareness of solution portfolios within the business unit and ability to connect engineering decisions to broader business value


**Leadership Expectations**
* Serve as a senior technical leader and trusted advisor, influencing architecture and engineering practices across teams and organizations
* Set a high bar for engineering excellence, including design rigor, code quality, security, and operational readiness
* Mentor and grow senior engineers and technical leaders through guidance, feedback, and example
* Lead complex initiatives with incomplete information, driving clarity through structured thinking and collaboration
* Foster a culture of learning, inclusion, accountability, and continuous improvement
* Demonstrate strong change leadership by guiding teams through technology transitions, platform evolution, and process improvements
* Build consensus across engineering, product, security, and leadership while maintaining high technical integrity.


**Inclusion And Diversity**
 GE Healthcare is an Equal Opportunity Employer where inclusion matters. Employment decisions are made without regard to race, colour, religion, national or ethnic origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, disability, protected veteran status or other characteristics protected by law.
   

  

 We expect all employees to live and breathe our behaviours: to act with humility and build trust; lead with transparency; deliver with focus, and drive ownership – always with unyielding integrity.
   

  

 Our
 **total rewards** 
 are designed to unlock your ambition by giving you the boost and flexibility you need to turn your ideas into world\\-changing realities. Our salary and benefits are everything you’d expect from an organization with global strength and scale, and you’ll be surrounded by career opportunities in a culture that fosters care, collaboration, and support.
